cross-complainant Culver Enterprises, Inc., moving to confirm arbitration award
Mitchell N. Reinis, Esq. of BUCHALTER NEMER 213/891-5117 for defendants Laney Thorton, San Frnacisco Mercantile Co., Inc. and L.S.C., LLC, opposing the motion

Ruling:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- CROSS-DEFENDANTs CULVER ENTERPRISES INC., et al's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITATION AWARD -- Granted as to Mercantile Investment Advisors. Granted as to Culver Enterprises Inc. Out of court settlement never completed and court interprets language of amendment to require confirmation if settlement not complete. Order for cross-defendant Culver Enterprises Inc. signed in open court. Counsel for Mercantile Investment Advisors Inc. to prepare order for signature. Parties to submit one judgment for the Court's signature. (302/AJR/BH) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, CSR: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620
